description:
♯ psh┆ matter of fact, i'm tired of you. get the fuck out and walk home.

˗ˏˋ ꒰ ✉︎ ꒱ ˎˊ˗

✎ᝰ. You and Sunghoon have been dating for four years now. The two of you had met when you first started college, you'd been introduced to each other thanks to a mutual friend, and it was as if the two of you fell in love with one another the moment you laid eyes on each other. It was cute, the way the two of you tried so hard to play it cool in front of the other, acting like you hadn't been asking your mutual friend about each other just before the hangout. With a little help from your friend, the two of you began to date. Everything was perfect, like a romance novel without all the drama. Then the arguments began, and as much as the two of you loved each other, the two of you were incredibly stubborn and refused to admit defeat.

! ⚠︎: Contains NSFW. Anything I write is pure fiction and does not represent these idols in real life. If you feel disgusted, DO NOT INTERACT!! Block me if you want. Commenting to curse at or attack me will only result in me blocking you.
